info.title: attendance-full
info.description: Event attendance management with advance RSVP functionality, real-time check-in, and group-based statistics

get.summary: List appointments visible to the current user

parameters.name: showPastAppointments
parameters.description: Whether to show past appointments instead of upcoming ones

parameters.name: unansweredOnly
parameters.description: When true, only return upcoming appointments that the user has not answered yet AND that are still open. Ignored when $showPastAppointments is true.

parameters.name: onlyForMe
parameters.description: When true, restrict the result to appointments the user is part of the target audience for (visibleUsers/Groups/Teams membership; appointments with no visibility restriction count as "for everyone" and are included). Useful for managers, who otherwise see every appointment in the system.

401.description: Current user is not logged in

visibleUsers.description: User IDs to make the appointment visible to

visibleGroups.description: Group IDs to make the appointment visible to

visibleTeams.description: Team IDs to make the appointment visible to

sendNotification.description: Whether to send notifications to visible users

calendarUri.description: URI of the source calendar (when imported from calendar)

calendarEventUid.description: UID of the source calendar event

attachments.description: File IDs to attach to the appointment

responseDeadline.description: Optional response deadline (ISO 8601). Cron auto-closes the inquiry once passed.

post.description: Marks the appointment as closed: no further responses are accepted and the reminder cron skips it. The appointment stays in the "upcoming" list with a closed badge; only when its end_datetime passes does it move to the past list.

get.description:
Returns admin-editable configuration, computed status, and available groups. System-wide capabilities (teamsAvailable, calendarSyncAvailable, notificationsAppEnabled) are available via GET /api/capabilities.
This endpoint requires admin access

401.description: Current user is not logged in

403.description: Logged in account must be an admin

whitelistedTeams.description: Team IDs allowed to use the app

mobileAppBannerEnabled.description: Whether the mobile app promotion banner is enabled

tags.name: quick_response
tags.description: Controller for handling quick response links from notifications and emails. All endpoints are public (no login required) and authenticated via signed tokens.

tags.name: self_checkin
tags.description: Controller for self-check-in via NFC / deep link. All endpoints require Nextcloud authentication (logged-in user).
